title: For the Sake of the Song: The Story of Anderson Fair
original_title: For the Sake of the Song: The Story of Anderson Fair
overview: A devoted community of artists, volunteers and patrons transform a politically subversive little neighborhood coffee house and restaurant into a unique American music institution.
